meaning: n.达太(基督教<<圣经·马太福音>>中的人物,耶稣十二使徒之一,被认为即是Jude)
examples: Philip, and Bartholomew; Thomas, and Matthew the publican; James the son of Alphaeus, and Lebbaeus, whose surname was Thaddaeus;
And Andrew, and Philip, and Bartholomew, and Matthew, and Thomas, and James the son of Alphaeus, and Thaddaeus, and Simon the canaanite.
